meaning: n.精神欢快.欣快,兴高采烈,[心]欣快症
examples: There was euphoria after the election.
Half a century on, the euphoria is long gone.
The early euphoria could rapidly fizzle into surly disappointment.
So he had advised readers to ride the wave of euphoria and exit Inmet now.
He was thrilled, but his euphoria over getting such a good deal was short-lived.
